text:
*[Bug 19056] New: Don't serialize growable bit*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19056>

            Bug ID: 19056
           Summary: Don't serialize growable bit
           Product: R
           Version: R 4.6.x
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Other
            Status: UNCONFIRMED
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Low-level
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:lionel.hry@gmail.com|lionel.hry@gmail.com>

Created attachment 3679
  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3679&action=edit>
Don't serialize growable bit

The serialiser feeds the new GROWABLE bit of vectors into the stream, leading
to `digest::digest()` and other hash implementations piggybacking on the
serialiser to return different hashes depending on the presence of the bit.

This affects `digest()`, which in turns affects the targets package. See
<https://github.com/r-lib/vctrs/issues/2144> for a downstream report.

I also noticed that the NOJIT bit gets fed for closures, which probably
shouldn't be the case. But to avoid a behaviour change (e.g. different hashes)
I've kept that in.
